events.title: Career Counseling 1:1's Drop Ins
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Career Engagement (via Graduate Division)
events.description: One-on-one career counseling sessions available for graduate students.

events.title: Beyond Publish or Perish: Redefining Academic Success
events.description: A session exploring the 'publish or perish' mentality in academia and strategies for well-being.

events.title: Working Productively with Your Dissertation Advisor: Perspectives from Berkeley Emeriti and Emeritae
events.description: Insights from experienced faculty on fostering productive relationships with dissertation advisors.

events.title: Fulbright U.S. Student Program General Presentation Session
events.description: General presentation about the Fulbright U.S. Student Program for interested graduate students.

events.title: The Grad Student Productive
events.description: A workshop focused on productivity strategies for graduate students.

events.title: Berkeley Grad Slam Competition
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Graduate students present their research in three-minute talks, competing for prizes. Free refreshments and snacks.

events.title: Handshake for Graduate Students
events.description: Workshop on utilizing the Handshake platform for career opportunities relevant to graduate students.

events.title: Educator's Tour: Theresa Hak Kyung Cha: Multiple Offerings
events.description: A guided tour for educators focusing on the Theresa Hak Kyung Cha exhibition.

events.title: Lijin Lecture: Joan Kee: Afro Asia, or Art for a Global Majority
events.description: A lecture by Joan Kee exploring the intersections of Afro-Asian art and global majority perspectives.

events.title: The Insatiable Machine: How Capitalism Conquered the World
events.description: A lecture discussing the historical and global impact of capitalism.

events.title: What is the American Jewish Novel? Thoughts on Jewish American Literature in the 21st Century
events.description: A discussion on the evolution and contemporary relevance of the American Jewish novel.

events.title: Bate-Papo
events.description: A casual conversation session, likely in Portuguese, for language practice and cultural exchange.

events.title: 2026 Barbara Boxer Lecture: City, State and Nation: A Conversation with Mayor Barbara Lee
events.description: A lecture featuring Mayor Barbara Lee on the interconnectedness of city, state, and national politics.

events.title: Matrix on Point: The U.S. Dollar Hegemony in Transition
events.description: A discussion on the shifting global economic landscape and the role of the U.S. dollar.

events.title: Avian-Human Worlds of Picuris Pueblo, NM
events.description: A talk exploring the cultural and ecological connections between birds and humans in Picuris Pueblo.

events.title: Curator's Tour: Tausif Noor on Rhapsody: Works from the Cooper Rosenwasser Collection
events.description: A curator-led tour and discussion of selected works from the Cooper Rosenwasser Collection.

events.title: The Politics of Zoomorphic Art at the Porous Borders in China and Central Asia (500 BCE-500 CE)
events.description: A lecture on the political and cultural significance of animal imagery in ancient art from China and Central Asia.

events.title: Carlin Wing, “Hitting Walls: Bounce and the Performance of Limits”
events.description: A talk by Carlin Wing on the concepts of bounce and performance in relation to limits.

events.title: Physical Witness: Atrocity X Disability in the Hebrew Bible (Corinna Guerrero)
events.description: A seminar exploring the intersection of atrocity and disability narratives in the Hebrew Bible.

events.title: Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater
events.description: A performance by the world-renowned Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater.
